official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1759846625,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450456159615470617","book_info":{"abstract":"（多女主+综漫，柯南、青物、路人女主、辉夜大小姐等）
我叫罗夏，从不知道什么时候开始，我会在睡梦中穿越世界，并且第二天醒来会变成不同的模样。
变成雨宫莲，和怪盗基德在雨夜上演一场怪盗秀。
变成纽特斯卡曼德，追捕跨界而来的黑巫师。
有时候我的变身也会给周围带来一些影响，变成蝙蝠侠，把哥谭重叠在了米花町上，这下真成了罪恶之都了。
还有时候，我会带着身边的人一起变身，把雪之下雪乃变成猫狸子，把早坂爱变成阿尔托莉雅，把灰原哀变成假面骑士Femme，让她自己去找琴酒复仇...","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa4f33cacc0f23adcc249f339d51bb14b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"今天也头疼","author_id":"","book_id":"7450456159615470617","book_name":"从综漫开始大变特变","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2029人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7450672894318756376","read_count":"2029","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"718758"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"343","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,多女主,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a24dc1052367aaf8d31b088c3df79413~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183607&x-signature=oRdp7RuBZt7YDVlRwmimrNTPXDM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3553253884704568","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"60"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174007392FF1B214ED96055CA7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suf
